texto: A baseball manager recognizes a nonphysical talent, hustle, as an essential gift of great players and great teams. It is the characteristic of running faster than necessary, moving sooner than necessary, trying harder than necessary. It is essential for great programming teams, too.
explicacao: Citação de Frederick P. Brooks Jr. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A baseball manager recognizes a nonphysical talent, hustle, as an essential gift of great players…” articula reflexao, management, great em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
